Date: Fri, 28 Mar 2025 03:00:00 +0000
Subject: Important Reminder: LlamaCloud Plan Update Is Here!
Message-ID: <05xhkgSdT4Ki-yzuuABv7Q@geopod-ismtpd-28>
Content-Type: multipart/alternative; boundary="8bf7751e2f36b5ba4f8edc11a73924e8ca9dd64627e6a7282404ebe07466"

Hi LlamaCloud User,

Just a quick reminder: Starting today, your account will
automatically transition to the Free plan at the end of your
current billing cycle!

What’s next?

* Upgrade anytime to Starter or Pro for increased usage limits.
* To upgrade: Go to LlamaCloud → Settings → Billing and select
your plan.

Image

Need help? Reach out to us: support@runllama.ai.

We’re excited to keep growing with you!

-The LlamaIndex Team

P.S. If you are an enterprise user, this email does not apply to
you.

---------------------
